Antibacterial Resistance Lab - Team Member - Kyuwon Shim (00565)
[Settlement] GloPID-R Q3 Sample Collection for Microbial Surveillance

The objective of this project is to collect samples from indoor surfaces and toilets in public transportation systems and communal places. These samples will be analyzed to characterize microbial communities and assess the prevalence of antimicrobial resistance (AMR).
Seoul station, Gangnam station, Department store, University etc.

R&D - 2025 GloPID-R Program(생명연 위탁)_1st_Soojin Jang [EZ] [NN2509-0000] [NN2509-0001] - Domestic Business Travel[410201]
(Period : 2025-01-01~2025-12-31)

[Settlement] Pariticipation in the KMB winter symposium

I will participate in the KMB symposium that will be held on Jan 14-16, 2026. Especially, the theme of the symposium is AI driven research in Microbiology lining up several reknowned speakers including Prof. Martin Steinegger whose AI and machine learnning tools are well recognized. Therefore, the contents of the symposium will help me to successfully conduct my current project of which goal is to develop new antibacterial molecules through AI models.

[Settlement] Pariticipation in the KMB winter symposium

I will participate in the KMB symposium that will be held on Jan 14-16, 2026. Especially, the theme of the symposium is AI driven research in Microbiology lining up several reknowned speakers including Prof. Martin Steinegger whose AI and machine learnning tools are well recognized. Therefore, the contents of the symposium will help me to successfully conduct my current project of which goal is to develop new antibacterial molecules through AI models.

Antibacterial Resistance Lab - Team Member - Juchan Hwang (00456)

Mid-term Career Plan ? Indoor Surface Sampling for Transportation-Related Microbiome Research
As part of my mid-term career development, I plan to conduct indoor surface sampling at Gangnam Station, a major public transportation hub in Seoul. The collected samples will undergo sequencing and microbiome analysis to investigate the composition and characteristics of bacterial communities present in high-traffic urban environments.
